title: Krim's Vampirism
description: A texture pack for vampire weapons
body:
Hey, have you ever play vampirism and thought, "why are the weapons 3D! WHY! WHY IS THERE TEXTURE LIKE THAT!" well so did I. So decided to remake them into something new. Some weapons will get complete remakes, others will basicly be an improvement.![The new texture compared to the old ones (very normal background)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d7624607200210cd73bf378108324beafc24cd0.png)

P.S, This pack was made for Vampirism.co, so there might be a few refrences to that server that you may not get.

P.S.S THIS IS A TEXTURAE PACK, NOT A MOD
